title: Projects
description: Projects are backed by Kubernetes Project CRDs in the current cluster.

create.title: Create project
create.description: A Project CRD will be created immediately.

detail.title: Project
detail.description: Editing saves directly to the Project CRD.

volumes.title: Volumes
volumes.description: Volumes are Kubernetes PersistentVolumeClaims in this project's namespace.

create.title: Create volume
create.description: Saving creates a PersistentVolumeClaim in the project namespace.

delete.title: Delete volume
delete.description: Delete volume "{{name}}"? The backing PersistentVolumeClaim will be removed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage the project name and deletion.

update.title: Project information
update.description: Saving updates the Project CRD directly.

danger_zone.title: Danger zone
danger_zone.description: Deleting the project may let the controller clean up related Kubernetes resources.

delete.title: Delete project
delete.description: Delete project "{{name}}"? Its Kubernetes resources may be removed by the controller.
